family_summary: Armed conflict between the Russian Federation and forces of the self-proclaimed Chechen Republic of Ichkeria. The war combined a major urban assault on Grozny, repeated village-level bombardment and 'mopping-up' operations, hostage episodes, and a distinct August 1996 Grozny counteroffensive. Because exposed civilian and combatant footprints changed sharply across episodes, a single whole-war denominator would be misleading.
notes: Bundle focuses on episode-first DR estimation for Grozny and regional campaign episodes with explicit denominator footprints between 1994-12-11 and 1996-08-31.
